mapper.select: SELECT foodId, foodName, category, description, imagePath FROM food

SELECT f.foodId, f.foodName, f.category, f.imagePath, COUNT(g.gameId) as winCount FROM food f JOIN game g ON f.foodId = g.food_id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(g.playDate, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY f.foodId, f.foodName, f.category, f.imagePath ORDER BY winCount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT f.foodName FROM food f JOIN twenty_attribute t ON f.foodId = t.foodId ORDER BY ( 0 + CASE WHEN #{categoryKorean} = 1 AND f.category = 'Korean food' THEN 10 WHEN #{categoryKorean} = 0 AND f.category != 'Korean food' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{categoryWestern} = 1 AND f.category = 'Western food' THEN 10 WHEN #{categoryWestern} = 0 AND f.category != 'Western food' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{categoryChinese} = 1 AND f.category = 'Chinese food' THEN 10 WHEN #{categoryChinese} = 0 AND f.category != 'Chinese food' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{categoryJapanese} = 1 AND f.category = 'Japanese food' THEN 10 WHEN #{categoryJapanese} = 0 AND f.category != 'Japanese food' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN #{categoryAsian} = 1 AND f.category = 'Asian food' THEN 10 WHEN #{categoryAsian} = 0 AND f.category != 'Asian food' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
+ CASE WHEN t.is_spicy = #{isSpicy} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_soup = #{isSoup} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_fried = #{isFried} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_roasted = #{isRoasted} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_pork = #{hasPork} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_beef = #{hasBeef} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
+ CASE WHEN t.has_noodle = #{hasNoodle} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_rice = #{hasRice} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_flour = #{hasFlour} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_seafood = #{hasSeafood} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.has_chicken = #{hasChicken} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_veggie = #{isVeggie} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_cold = #{isCold} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_greasy = #{isGreasy} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_sweet = #{isSweet} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_solo = #{isSolo} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_sharing = #{isSharing} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN t.is_heavy = #{isHeavy} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END ) DESC LIMIT 3
